params.name: Chan-hee's Figure
params.description: Before being split in half by Hitman One, Chan-hee was a youthful and beautiful anchor, and this figure perfectly depicts how she looked like at that time. Since Chan-hee 1/2 and Demon Chan-hee took over, this figurine became even more valuable.
